title: News | Dame Harriett Baldwin MP
text_excerpt: News | Dame Harriett Baldwin MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Harriett About West Worcestershire News Harriett in the press Newsletters In Parliament Treasury Committee FAQs Search Gallery Contact Imagebank Toggle navigation Main navigation Home About Harriett About West Worcestershire News Harriett in the press Newsletters In Parliament Treasury Committee FAQs Search Gallery Contact Imagebank News Local Concerns Reflected in Malvern Hills Bill Amendments 29 April 2026 Legislative proposals to revise the ways that the Malvern Hills are preserved will return to the House of Lords but with a series of amendments reflecting the objections raised by local people. Malvern Students Back Social Media Restrictions 29 April 2026 Students at a Malvern school would support measures preventing young people’s access to social media and don’t think the voting age should be changed. MP Calls for Priority Shift to Fix County Roads 28 April 2026 West Worcestershire MP Dame Harriett Baldwin has urged the county council to urgently re-think its highways priorities to allow for a swift fix of the collapsed road on the edge of Tenbury Wells and the final completion of the A449. MP Calls On Councillors to Act on County Road Closure 20 April 2026 West Worcestershire MP Dame Harriett Baldwin has repeated her call for urgent action to fix a collapsed road which is forcing local people to make huge diversions to get to and from work. MP: Parents Need News on County Respite Care 20 April 2026 West Worcestershire MP Dame Harriett Baldwin has urged councillors to show some urgency in arranging to meet with parents and carers who will be affected by the relocation of respite care provision. Image MP Welcomes Speedy Action to Protect Broadband Services 15 April 2026 West Worcestershire MP Dame Harriett Baldwin has welcomed action which will see a telegraph pole relocated at the site of the collapsed road on the outskirts of Tenbury Wells. Image MP Joins Local Opposition to Rural Sports Cull 13 April 2026 West Worcestershire MP Dame Harriett Baldwin has slammed the Government’s plans to cull rural sports with consultations which threaten people who enjoy hunting and shooting pursuits. MP Calls for Urgent Action on County Road Closure 13 April 2026 West Worcestershire MP Dame Harriett Baldwin has called for urgent action to fix a collapsed road which is forcing local people to make huge diversions to get to and from work. MP Welcomes Heating Oil and Gas Regulator Review 10 April 2026 West Worcestershire MP Dame Harriett Baldwin has welcomed confirmation that the competition regulator is carrying out a full review of companies supplying heating oil and LPG to rural homes.
